title: eurya wardii
intro: Eurya wardii, also known as the Ward's eurya or Chinese rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Eurya wardii include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Eurya wardii is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal properties.
